title: dasysphaera hyposericea
intro: Dasysphaera hyposericea, also known as the hyposericea daisy or false daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Australia and Southeast Asia. Dasysphaera hyposericea has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant include the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices.
